name: ChatGPT: Recent Chats
summary: Open ChatGPT in the active tab, inspect recent conversation history, and return the most recent chats with optional day-window filtering.
description: Open ChatGPT in the active tab, inspect recent conversation history, and return the most recent chats with optional day-window filtering.

steps.name: Open ChatGPT home in the active tab
Give transient UI a moment to settle
Wait for the shell or sidebar

inputs.script: const params = window.__rzn_params || {}; const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const parseNumber = (value, fallback) => { const parsed = Number.parseInt(String(value == null ? '' : value).trim(), 10); return Number.isFinite(parsed) && parsed > 0 ? parsed : fallback; }; const parseTime = (value) => { const ts = value ? Date.parse(value) : NaN; return Number.isFinite(ts) ? ts : 0; }; const limit = parseNumber(params.limit, 10); const days = parseNumber(params.days, 0); const isVisible = (node) => !!(node && node instanceof Element && getComputedStyle(node).visibility !== 'hidden' && getComputedStyle(node).display !== 'none' && node.getBoundingClientRect().width > 0 && node.getBoundingClientRect().height > 0); const normalizeUrl = (raw) => { if (!raw) return ''; try { return new URL(raw, window.location.origin).toString(); } catch { return String(raw); } }; const chatIdFromHref = (raw) => { const url = normalizeUrl(raw); if (!url) return ''; try { const match = new URL(url).pathname.match(/^\/c\/([^/?#]+)/); return match ? match[1] : ''; } catch { return ''; } }; const bucketDaysFromLabel = (label) => { const text = normalize(label).toLowerCase(); if (!text) return null; if (/today/.test(text)) return 0; if (/yesterday/.test(text)) return 1; if (/last\s+7\s+days|previous\s+7\s+days|this\s+week/.test(text)) return 7; if (/last\s+30\s+days|previous\s+30\s+days|this\s+month/.test(text)) return 30; if (/older|archive|earlier/.test(text)) return 365; return null; }; const getConversationHistoryItems = () => { for (let index = 0; index < localStorage.length; index += 1) { const key = localStorage.key(index); if (!key || !/conversation-history/i.test(key)) continue; try { const raw = localStorage.getItem(key); if (!raw) continue; const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); const pages = Array.isArray(parsed?.value?.pages) ? parsed.value.pages : []; const items = pages.flatMap((page) => Array.isArray(page?.items) ? page.items : []); return items.filter((item) => item && typeof item.id === 'string'); } catch {} } return []; }; const collectDomEntries = () => { const anchors = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("aside a[href*='/c/'], nav a[href*='/c/'], main a[href*='/c/']")).filter(isVisible); const entries = []; const seen = new Set(); anchors.forEach((anchor, index) => { const href = normalizeUrl(anchor.getAttribute('href') || anchor.href); const chatId = chatIdFromHref(href); if (!chatId || seen.has(chatId)) return; seen.add(chatId); const text = normalize(anchor.textContent || ''); const lines = text.split('\n').map((line) => normalize(line)).filter(Boolean); const title = lines[0] || chatId; const preview = lines.slice(1).join(' ').slice(0, 240) || null; const container = anchor.closest('li, section, div, article') || anchor.parentElement || anchor; const heading = container?.closest('section, nav, aside, div')?.querySelector?.('h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, [role="heading"], strong') || null; const headingText = normalize(heading?.textContent || ''); const bucketDays = bucketDaysFromLabel(headingText); entries.push({ thread_id: chatId, chat_id: chatId, title, thread_url: href, url: href, last_message_preview: preview, update_time: null, create_time: null, updated_at_ms: 0, created_at_ms: 0, section_label: headingText || null, bucket_days: bucketDays, source: 'dom_sidebar', sidebar_order: index }); }); return entries; }; const merged = new Map(); getConversationHistoryItems().forEach((item, index) => { const chatId = normalize(item.id); if (!chatId) return; merged.set(chatId, { thread_id: chatId, chat_id: chatId, title: normalize(item.title || '') || chatId, thread_url: normalizeUrl('/c/' + chatId), url: normalizeUrl('/c/' + chatId), last_message_preview: null, update_time: item.update_time || null, create_time: item.create_time || null, updated_at_ms: Math.max(parseTime(item.update_time), parseTime(item.create_time)), created_at_ms: parseTime(item.create_time), section_label: null, bucket_days: null, source: 'local_storage', history_index: index }); }); collectDomEntries().forEach((entry) => { const existing = merged.get(entry.chat_id); if (!existing) { merged.set(entry.chat_id, entry); return; } merged.set(entry.chat_id, { ...existing, last_message_preview: existing.last_message_preview || entry.last_message_preview || null, section_label: existing.section_label || entry.section_label || null, bucket_days: existing.bucket_days ?? entry.bucket_days ?? null, sidebar_order: entry.sidebar_order, source: existing.source === 'local_storage' ? 'local_storage+dom_sidebar' : existing.source }); }); let entries = Array.from(merged.values()); const cutoffMs = days > 0 ? Date.now() - (days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000) : 0; if (cutoffMs > 0) { entries = entries.filter((entry) => (entry.updated_at_ms && entry.updated_at_ms >= cutoffMs) || (entry.created_at_ms && entry.created_at_ms >= cutoffMs) || (typeof entry.bucket_days === 'number' && entry.bucket_days <= days)); } entries.sort((left, right) => { const leftTs = left.updated_at_ms || left.created_at_ms || 0; const rightTs = right.updated_at_ms || right.created_at_ms || 0; if (rightTs !== leftTs) return rightTs - leftTs; const leftBucket = typeof left.bucket_days === 'number' ? left.bucket_days : Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER; const rightBucket = typeof right.bucket_days === 'number' ? right.bucket_days : Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER; if (leftBucket !== rightBucket) return leftBucket - rightBucket; const leftOrder = Number.isFinite(left.sidebar_order) ? left.sidebar_order : Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER; const rightOrder = Number.isFinite(right.sidebar_order) ? right.sidebar_order : Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER; return leftOrder - rightOrder; }); const returned = entries.slice(0, limit); const bodyText = normalize(document.body?.textContent || '').toLowerCase(); return { url: window.location.href, title: document.title, total_available: entries.length, returned_count: returned.length, filters: { limit, days }, auth_required: entries.length === 0 && /log in|sign up|welcome back|continue with/i.test(bodyText), threads: returned };

help.summary: Open ChatGPT in the active tab, inspect recent conversation history, and return the most recent chats with optional day-window filtering.
